_comment: Mutation testing for the financial hot path. Runs nightly; not a per-PR gate (too slow). Target >80% mutation score on decimalMath + idempotency.
_comment_mutate: Files with dedicated property/unit tests. decimalMath + safeJson run via `test:property` (no DB). idempotency is covered by `test:integration` against the docker-compose fixture and is mutated separately once the fixture is wired into CI.
_comment_timeout: Per-mutant timeout (not per-run). Stryker kills a mutant that runs longer than this. Low enough to keep runaway mutants from burning workflow time, high enough that real property tests (which run 500 iterations with fast-check) complete.
